data.body:
[Holiday Celebration Gift]

Sensei, how is the end of the year going for you?
Thanks to you, we made many happy memories this year.
Please accept this gift as a token of gratitude!💎

🗓️Valid until 1/6 (Mon) 2:59 PM (UTC)
➡️View Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=2705118
